reviews.review_msg: This course covers fascinating history on indigenous treaties you wouldn't encounter elsewhere. She explains the material with passion and knowledge. You get two attempts for each online quiz and plenty of time to do them. This course is fun, easy, and genuinely interesting. Highly recommend to take this course with her!
Professor Todd was really really good. I'm taking her course and the assignments are fun and she's also very caring with students. I'd definitely recommend her course to any other student

Zoe is an amazing professor. She is very caring and understanding. You do need to put in the work, but she is always there to help. She is not a hard grader either, as long as you show you put in effort. She understands people have lives and things happen. I would recommend any course with Zoe!!!!
